---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What's the problem you're trying to solve? Describe the use case, not just the proposed solution.

## Proposed solution

How you'd like it to work. Sketches, API shapes, or UI mockups welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why this one seems better.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art in other tools, or anything else that helps.
